title: turnera campaniflora
intro: Turnera campaniflora, also known as the West Indian passionflower, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turnera campaniflora include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain and inflammation relief. Herbal preparations of Turnera campaniflora can be found in teas, tinctures, and supplements, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
